message:
perf(btree): replace recursive count_all_rows with iterative stack-based traversal

Eliminate recursion in the B-tree row counting path to avoid stack
overflow on deep trees and reduce per-page overhead.

cursor.rs:
- Replace count_all_rows_inner recursive method with
  count_all_rows_iterative using an explicit visit_stack
  Vec<(PageNumber, cell_idx, cell_count, rightmost_child)>
- Add read_interior_cell_child helper that extracts the 4-byte
  big-endian left-child page number directly from raw cell bytes,
  skipping full parse_cell_at overhead (avoids decoding payload
  and overflow pointers that count never needs)
- Leaf pages counted purely from page header cell_count field
  with no cell parsing
- Remove saved_stack_len workaround from cursor state restore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
